job_description:
Application Support Engineer

The Application Support Engineer is responsible for providing technical and functional support to customers using the organization’s software products (mainly Mortgage and Forex). The role involves troubleshooting application and integration issues, managing incidents through ITSM processes, coordinating with internal technical teams, and ensuring timely resolution of customer issues while maintaining high levels of customer satisfaction and system availability.

Responsibilities:

  • Provide technical and functional support to new and existing customers via email, phone calls, and online meetings (Google Meet or similar platforms).
  • Analyze and understand customer issues related to Mortgage loan processing and Forex transactions, gather necessary information, and provide appropriate solutions or workarounds.
  • Log, track, and update incidents, service requests, and problem tickets using ITSM tools.
  • Troubleshoot application, data, and integration issues related to loan processing systems, APIs, and forex transaction modules.
  • Coordinate with internal teams such as development, infrastructure, and product teams to resolve complex technical issues.
  • Follow IT Service Management (ITSM) processes including incident, problem, change, and release management.
  • Perform root cause analysis (RCA) for recurring issues and recommend preventive actions.
  • Monitor application health, batch processes, and system performance to ensure smooth operations.
  • Assist customers during critical business periods such as disbursement cycles or forex transaction processing.
  • Maintain accurate documentation of issues, solutions, and troubleshooting procedures.
  • Participate in application deployments, patch releases, and post-release monitoring.
  • Work in rotational shifts and provide on-call support when required to support production environments.

Required Work Experience:

  • Experience providing technical or application support to global clients via call or email.
  • Hands-on experience supporting technical queries raised by customers.
  • Experience working with ITSM tools for incident logging and tracking.
  • Ability to identify root causes and troubleshoot complex issues.
  • Experience coordinating with internal technical teams for issue resolution.

Must-Have Technical Skills:

  • Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills
  • Experience providing customer support through calls, emails, and collaboration tools
  • Understanding of IT support and service management processes
  • Excellent communication and customer handling skills

Good-to-Have Technical Skills:

  • Basic knowledge of .NET, SQL, and Microsoft technologies
  • Experience with ITSM tools
  • Knowledge of IT best practices

Experience Range:

2-5 years of experience in application support or technical support roles.

Educational Qualification:

B.Tech / B.E / BSc Computer Science or equivalent.

Contact: For applications, email your resume to jobs@emsyne.com.
summary: Application Support Engineer provides technical support for Mortgage and Forex software, troubleshoots issues, and coordinates with teams to ensure customer satisfaction and system reliability.

Location: Thejaswini, Technopark Phase I, Technopark Rd, Technopark Campus, 695581 Website: https://www.ateamsoftsolutions.com Walk-In Dates: 01 June 2026 - 05 June 2026 Time: 10:00 AM - 05:00 PM Published On: 31 May 2026 Contact Email: recruitment@ateamsoftsolutions.com

Job Title

Talent Acquisition Specialist

Work Mode

Work From Office (WFO)

Work Schedule

Working Days: Monday to Saturday

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage end-to-end IT recruitment processes for technical positions.
  • Source candidates via LinkedIn, Naukri, job portals, and other platforms.
  • Screen and shortlist candidates based on technical and business requirements.
  • Coordinate interviews and follow up with candidates throughout the hiring cycle.
  • Maintain candidate databases and recruitment trackers.
  • Collaborate with hiring managers to align with hiring priorities.
  • Ensure a positive candidate experience during recruitment.

Required Skills

  • 3+ years of experience in IT recruitment and technical hiring.
  • Strong candidate sourcing skills on LinkedIn, Naukri, and job portals.
  • Proficiency in evaluating technical skills for IT roles.
  • Experience managing candidates across India.
  • Ability to handle multiple openings simultaneously.
  • Capability to attend semi-technical screening rounds.
  • Excellent communication, coordination, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Adaptability to fast-paced recruitment environments.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience in IT services or software companies.
  • Prior experience conducting preliminary interviews.
  • Immediate joiners are preferred.

Why Join Us?

  • Opportunity to work in a dynamic, growing recruitment environment.
  • Exposure to diverse technologies and hiring needs.
  • Collaborative culture with learning and growth opportunities.
  • Direct ownership of recruitment success.

Application Process

  • Email/WhatsApp: Share resume, full name, and contact number to recruitment@ateamsoftsolutions.com or via WhatsApp.
  • Walk-In Venue: 2nd Level, Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India.
  • Entry Pass Requirements:
  • Apply for a Technopark entry pass via mobile app or website.
  • Softcopy of the pass must be shown at the entrance gate.
  • Non-smartphone users can print a hardcopy using a 5-digit OTP received via SMS/email at Technopark kiosks.
  • Original certificates will be verified at the entry gate.

Mobile App Downloads: - Android - iOS

User Manual: Click here
summary: Experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist managing IT recruitment across India. Requires 3+ years in technical hiring with strong sourcing skills.
